introSection: Great Lego Race, previously known as Project X, is a roller coaster located at Legoland Malaysia in Iskandar Puteri, Johor, Malaysia.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Project X opened on 15 September 2012.

On 22 November 2017, VR headsets were added the ride and it was renamed Great Lego Race.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows, for a total of 4 riders per car. The cars are designed to look like they were built using Lego Technic bricks.

fullText:
Great Lego Race, previously known as Project X, is a roller coaster located at Legoland Malaysia in Iskandar Puteri, Johor, Malaysia.

Project X opened on 15 September 2012.

On 22 November 2017, VR headsets were added the ride and it was renamed Great Lego Race.

Single cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows, for a total of 4 riders per car. The cars are designed to look like they were built using Lego Technic bricks.
